sources.title: Greater Mapungubwe Heritage Site and Tour

slides.heading: IMapungubwe: UBukumkani base-Afrika Kudala
slides.lead: Malunga neminyaka engama-800 eyadlulayo, ubukumkani bokuqala obukhulu baseMzantsi Afrika baba sisityebi ngenxa yorhwebo lwegolide ne-ivory - apha kanye kumhlaba wethu.

image.alt: Induli enomphezulu osicaba yelitye lentlabathi ekhazimla ngombala wegolide phantsi kwelanga lase-Afrika, kunye nomlambo ngezantsi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='250' cy='46' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M0 120 h320 v60 h-320 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M70 120 q10 -46 74 -46 q64 0 74 46 Z' fill='#c8934a'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='72' height='10' fill='#a8762f'/><path d='M0 150 q80 -14 160 0 q80 14 160 0 v30 h-320 Z' fill='#6a86a8'/></svg>

slides.notes: Qala ngokubuza abafundi into abasele beyazi ngobukumkani base-Afrika ngaphambi kokufika kwabelungu. Yenza umbono ophambili kwasekuqaleni: kudala phambi ko-1652, abantu baseMzantsi Afrika bakha ubukumkani obusisityebi, obululungiselelwe kakuhle, obabusenza urhwebo namazwe akude. Igama elithi 'Mapungubwe' kudla ngokuthiwa lithetha 'induli yempungutye'. Namhlanje ikwiPhondo laseLimpopo.

slides.heading: Ubukumkani apho amazwe amathathu adibana khona
slides.lead: IMapungubwe yakhula kwiNtlambo yaseLimpopo malunga neminyaka engama-900 eyadlulayo.

blocks.text: IMapungubwe ikumantla **ePhondo laseLimpopo**, kufuphi nalapho **iimilambo iLimpopo neShashe** idibana khona. Le yindawo apho uMzantsi Afrika, iZimbabwe neBotswana zichukumisana khona namhlanje.

items: Abantu bahlala apha okokuqala ekuqaleni kwee-1100 (malunga neminyaka engama-900 eyadlulayo).
Ubukumkani babusisityebi kwaye bomelele kakhulu ukususela malunga no-1220 ukuya ku-1300.
Yayibubukumkani bokuqala baseMzantsi Afrika - indawo elawulwa ngukumkani.

image.alt: Imephu elula ebonisa iimilambo emibini ihlangana, kunye nenduli ephawulwe kwindawo yokuhlangana.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 40 q60 30 96 70 q30 30 100 42' fill='none' stroke='#6a86a8' stroke-width='7' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M60 20 q30 40 56 90' fill='none' stroke='#6a86a8' stroke-width='7' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M104 96 q10 -18 26 -18 q16 0 26 18 Z' fill='#c8934a'/><circle cx='130' cy='96' r='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/><text x='138' y='94' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#333'>Mapungubwe</text></svg>

slides.notes: Bonisa le ndawo kwimephu yeklasi yoMzantsi Afrika - kumantla akude, kufuphi neMusina (iMessina). Iimilambo yayibalulekile kuba yayinika amanzi abantu, izilimo neenkomo kwindawo eyomileyo. Gxininisa ixesha kubafundi: 'malunga neminyaka engama-900 eyadlulayo' kumalunga nootatomkhulu abangama-30 ababuyela emva.

slides.heading: Isixeko phezu kwenduli
slides.lead: Njengoko ubukumkani bukhula, abantu ababaluleke kakhulu bafudukela phezulu kwenduli ende, esicaba.

blocks.text: Ekuqaleni abantu babehlala kumhlaba osicaba ngezantsi. Njengoko iMapungubwe yaba sisityebi kwaye yaxineneka, **ukumkani nosapho lwasebukhosini bafudukela phezulu kwenduli**, ngeli xesha uninzi lwabantu luhlala kwithafa elingezantsi. Abasebenzi bade bathwala iitoni zomhlaba benyuka le nduli emredlelele ukwenza izitiya nemigangatho.

items: Induli inamacala amredlelele kwaye ineendlela ezimxinwa kuphela zokuya phezulu.
Ukuhlala phezulu kwakubonisa ukuba ukumkani unamandla kwaye ubalulekile.
Amawaka abantu ayehlala kule dolophu nakufuphi nayo ngexesha lokuxakeka kwayo.

image.alt: Induli ende enomphezulu osicaba eneendlwana ezincinci ezingqukuva phezulu kunye neminye emininzi ethafeni ngezantsi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M70 120 q6 -60 50 -60 q44 0 50 60 Z' fill='#c8934a'/><rect x='86' y='58' width='68' height='6' fill='#a8762f'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='104' cy='52' r='7'/><circle cx='120' cy='50' r='7'/><circle cx='136' cy='52' r='7'/></g><g fill='#8a6a44'><circle cx='30' cy='132' r='8'/><circle cx='52' cy='136' r='8'/><circle cx='190' cy='134' r='8'/><circle cx='212' cy='130' r='8'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Le yintliziyo yebali lolwakhiwo loluntu kwaye libuya kamva. Ukufudukela phezu kwenduli yayilutshintsho olukhulu: okokuqala kulo mmandla, iinkokeli zazihlala zodwa kwaye phezu kwabantu abaqhelekileyo. Chaza 'usapho lwasebukhosini' ngokulula - ukumkani nezalamane zakhe. Umhlaba othwelweyo ubonisa ukuba abantu basebenza kangakanani na ukuhlonipha ukumkani.

slides.heading: Abalimi, abelusi kunye nabarhwebi
slides.lead: Ubutyebi beMapungubwe baqala ngokutya neenkomo, hayi igolide kuphela.

blocks.heading: Ukulima
blocks.text: Abantu babelima izilimo ezinjengamabele nonyawuthi baze bagcine iinkozo ezongezelelweyo ngamaxesha anzima.

blocks.heading: Iinkomo
blocks.text: Imihlambi yeenkomo yayingumqondiso wobutyebi kwaye yayisetyenziswa ukubonisa ukuba usapho lusisityebi kangakanani na.

blocks.heading: Ubugcisa
blocks.text: Abasebenzi abanobuchule benza iimbiza zodongwe, ilaphu, izixhobo zentsimbi kunye nezinto ezintle zegolide.

slides.notes: Lungisa impazamo eqhelekileyo: ubukumkani babungasosityebi ngenxa yegolide kuphela. Ukulima okuhle nemihlambi emikhulu yeenkomo kwanika abantu ukutya okwaneleyo nexesha lokurhweba nokwenza ubugcisa. Iinkozo ezongezelelweyo ezigciniweyo zazithetha ukuba uluntu lunokusinda kwiminyaka eyomileyo luze luxhase iinkokeli nabenzi bobugcisa.

slides.heading: Ukurhweba namazwe akude
slides.lead: IMapungubwe yathengisa igolide ne-ivory yaza yathenga izinto ezintle ezivela phesheya kolwandle.

blocks.text: Abarhwebi babethwala **igolide ne-ivory** (amabamba eendlovu) besuka eMapungubwe besiya kumazibuko akunxweme olusempuma lwe-Afrika. Ukusuka apho impahla yayihamba ngenqanawa isiya kumazwe akude. Ngokubuyisela, iMapungubwe yayifumana iintsimbi zeglasi, ilaphu nezinye izinto ezixabisekileyo.

items: IMapungubwe yayirhweba neendawo ezikude njengeTshayina, iIndiya ne-Arabia.
Igolide ne-ivory zazithuthwa ziphuma; iintsimbi zeglasi nelaphu zazingena.
Oku kwenza iMapungubwe ibe yinxalenye yorhwebo lwehlabathi malunga neminyaka engama-800 eyadlulayo.

image.alt: Ibamba lendlovu namaqhekeza egolide kwelinye icala kunye nomtya weentsimbi zeglasi kwelinye, zidityaniswe yimikhondo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 160' role='img'><rect width='260' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M28 96 q30 -34 60 -8 q-24 8 -60 8 Z' fill='#efe7d2' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='40' cy='118' r='8' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='56' cy='124' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M104 78 h52 M104 92 h52' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' marker-end='url(#a)'/><g><line x1='104' y1='78' x2='150' y2='78' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M150 72 l12 6 l-12 6 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><line x1='156' y1='92' x2='110' y2='92' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M110 86 l-12 6 l12 6 Z' fill='#2f5233'/></g><g fill='#3f6bb0'><circle cx='196' cy='96' r='7'/><circle cx='212' cy='104' r='7'/><circle cx='228' cy='96' r='7'/><circle cx='220' cy='84' r='7'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuba yintoni i-ivory (ibamba lendlovu) uze uphawule ngobunono ukuba urhwebo lwe-ivory lwazenzakalisa iindlovu - unxibelelwano oluhle kwiziKili zoBomi (Life Skills). Umbono omkhulu: abantu base-Afrika apha babengasikwanga kwihlabathi; babengabarhwebi abakhutheleyo kuthungelwano olufikelela e-Asia. [SME] Nceda uqinisekise uluhlu oluchanekileyo lwamahlakani orhwebo namazibuko ngokwamagama eBanga 6; imithombo ikhankanya iTshayina, iIndiya, iYiputa ne-Arabia ngamazibuko onxweme lweMpuma Afrika.

slides.heading: Umkhombe wegolide
slides.lead: Into eyaziwa kakhulu evela eMapungubwe ngumkhombe omncinci ogqunywe ngegolide.

blocks.text: Iingcali zezinto zakudala (archaeologists) zafumana **umkhombe omncinci owenziwe ngegolide ethambileyo** owubunjelwe phezu komongo womthi. Wafunyanwa engcwabeni lasebukhosini phezu kwenduli. Umkhombe wegolide ubonisa ukuba babenobuchule kangakanani na abakhandi begolide baseMapungubwe, kwaye ngoku ungumqondiso wokuzingca wembali enzulu yoMzantsi Afrika.
Umkhombe wegolide usixelela ukuba abantu base-Afrika apha babesenza ubugcisa obuhle begolide kumakhulu eminyaka eyadlulayo.

items: Wangcwatywa nokumkani okanye inkokeli ebalulekileyo.
Izinto zegolide ezinje zazibonisa amandla nobutyebi basebukhosini.
Owona wonga uphakamileyo welizwe loMzantsi Afrika ubizwa ngokuba yiOrder of Mapungubwe.

image.alt: Umfanekiso omncinci womkhombe wegolide onophondo olunye, umi phezu kwesiseko.

slides.notes: Umkhombe wegolide yeyona ndawo iphakamileyo ngokweemvakalelo yesifundo - into yokwenene abafundi abanokuyithelekelela. Yigcine ilula: iqweqwe legolide elithambileyo phezu komthi okroliweyo. [SME] Qinisekisa ukuba nguwuphi umfanekiso omnye omawuvele phambili (umkhombe odumileyo) kunengqokelela ebanzi yegolide, kunye nekhaya lamanje lemyuziyam (iYunivesithi yasePitoli) ukuba ufuna ukuyibiza. Phepha ukubanga ngokugqithisileyo ubunzima obuchanekileyo kwinqanaba leBanga 6.

slides.heading: Ngubani owayehlala phi
slides.lead: IMapungubwe yayiyenye yeendawo zokuqala kulo mmandla apho iinkokeli zazihlala zodwa kubantu abanye bonke.

items: Ukumkani nosapho lwasebukhosini.
Babegcinwa bodwa ukubonisa ukuba babebalulekile.
Bangcwatywa negolide xa besifa.
Uninzi lwabantu abaqhelekileyo: abalimi, abelusi nabenzi bobugcisa.
Babehlala kwizindlu ezingqukuva kufuphi namasimi abo.
Bangcwatywa ngaphandle kobutyebi begolide.

slides.notes: Esi slayidi sichaza ngokuthe ngqo ulwakhiwo loluntu. Sebenzisa amagama athi 'udidi' okanye 'isikhundla' ngobunono kwiBanga 6: abanye abantu babenamandla nobutyebi obungaphezulu kunabanye, kwaye oku wawukubona kwindawo abahlala kuyo. Kuphathe ngentlonipho - phepha ukucebisa ukuba abantu abaqhelekileyo babengabalulekanga; babelima ukutya besenza izinto ezenza ubukumkani bube sisityebi.

slides.heading: Ukuphinda kufunyanwe kweMapungubwe
slides.lead: Ibali leMapungubwe labaliswa ngumhlaba ngokwawo - ngokusebenzisa oko abantu abakumbayo.

blocks.text: Abantu bendawo babesoloko besazi ukuba induli ibalulekile. Ngo-**1932** iqela elakhokelelwa phezu kwenduli lafumana iindonga zamatye, iimbiza zodongwe, iintsimbi zeglasi negolide. Ukususela ngoko, **iingcali zezinto zakudala** (archaeologists, izazinzulu ezifunda ngexesha elidlulileyo ngokumba) ziye ngononophelo zafumanisa amangcwaba, izindlu nezinto ezisifundisa indlela abantu ababephila ngayo.

items: Sifunda ngeMapungubwe ngezinto, hayi ngeencwadi ezibhaliweyo.
Iintsimbi neembiza zodongwe zibonisa urhwebo nobomi bemihla ngemihla.
Amangcwaba abonisa ukuba ngubani owayesisityebi, onamandla okanye oqhelekileyo.

image.alt: Izandla nebhrashi zivumbulula iimbiza zodongwe neentsimbi ezingcwatyelwe emhlabeni.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='84' width='240' height='76' fill='#c8934a'/><path d='M60 128 q22 -22 48 0 Z' fill='#8a5a34'/><g fill='#3f6bb0'><circle cx='150' cy='120' r='5'/><circle cx='164' cy='126' r='5'/><circle cx='178' cy='120' r='5'/></g><rect x='150' y='60' width='40' height='8' rx='4' fill='#7a5a3a' transform='rotate(-20 170 64)'/><rect x='182' y='44' width='10' height='24' rx='3' fill='#d8c8a8' transform='rotate(-20 187 56)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yazisa umbono we-archaeology nobungqina - obusembindini wokugxila kweCAPS 'kwindlela esazi ngayo ngexesha elidlulileyo'. Phawula ngobunono ukuba nangona u-1932 ubizwa ngokuba 'kukufunyanwa', abantu ababehlala kufuphi babesele besazi kudala ukuba induli ingcwele; izinto zazizintsha kwizazinzulu, hayi kubahlali bengingqi. [SME] Qinisekisa inqanaba leenkcukacha zamagama ozifunayo malunga nokufunyanwa kuka-1932 kwiBanga 6.

slides.heading: Ibali leMapungubwe

blocks.alt: Ulandelelwano lwexesha ukususela malunga no-1100 ukuza kuthi ga namhlanje olubonisa ukuvela, incopho, ukuwa kunye nokwamkelwa kweMapungubwe kamva.

events.label: IMapungubwe iba bubukumkani obusisityebi; ukumkani ufudukela phezu kwenduli
Urhwebo oluxakekileyo lwegolide ne-ivory namazwe akude
Igolide nezinye izinto zifunyanwa ziingcali zezinto zakudala

slides.notes: Sebenzisa ulandelelwano lwexesha ukuqinisa ulandelelwano: ukuvela, incopho, ukuwa, uze uphinde ufunyanwe kudala emva koko. Imihla imalunga ('c.' ithetha 'malunga') kuba kwakungekho zirekhodi zibhaliweyo. Cela abafundi baqikelele ukuba bubukumkani bube namandla iminyaka emingaphi (malunga neminyaka engama-80 ukuya kwengama-100 kwincopho yayo). [SME] Qinisekisa unyaka ochanekileyo wokudweliswa kweUNESCO (odla ngokunikwa njengo-2003).

slides.heading: Kutheni iMapungubwe yehla?
slides.lead: Emva malunga no-1300 ubukumkani baphulukana namandla abo kwaye uninzi lwabantu lwahamba.

blocks.text: Malunga no-1300 imozulu ibonakala isiba **ibanda kwaye yoma** ngakumbi. Imvula encinci yenza kwanzima ukulima izilimo nokugcina iinkomo zabantu abaninzi kangaka kwindawo enye. Urhwebo lwaqala lwafudukela kwiziko elitsha, **iGreat Zimbabwe**, ngasemantla ngakumbi.

items: Imozulu eyomileyo yenza ukulima nokwalusa kube nzima.
Abantu bafuduka ukuya kufuna umhlaba namanzi angcono.
IGreat Zimbabwe yakhula yaba bubukumkani obulandelayo obukhulu borhwebo.

image.alt: Intsimi eyomileyo enemiqhephu enelanga elishushu nomthi ongenamahlamba, ebonisa imbalela.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='196' cy='40' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='108' width='240' height='52' fill='#cbb27e'/><path d='M40 130 l20 -6 M100 140 l24 -4 M150 126 l26 6 M60 150 l30 -2' stroke='#9a8250' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><path d='M60 108 v-30 q-14 -4 -18 -16 q16 6 18 8 q2 -14 -6 -22 q14 6 14 20 q6 -10 18 -12 q-8 12 -18 18 v34 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nika zombini izizathu eziphambili ezixutywayo zizifundiswa: utshintsho lwemozulu (ukoma, ukubanda) kunye nokufuduka korhwebo ukuya eGreat Zimbabwe. Yiba nyaniso kwinqanaba leBanga 6 ukuba asiqinisekanga ngokupheleleyo - oku kufundisa ukuba imbali ngamanye amaxesha inengcaciso engaphezu kwenye enokwenzeka. Nxibelelanisa phambili: iGreat Zimbabwe bubukumkani obulandelayo abafundi abaqhele ukubufunda.

slides.heading: Ilifa lase-Afrika elizingcayo
slides.lead: IMapungubwe isikhumbuza ukuba abantu base-Afrika bakha ubukumkani obusisityebi, obukrelekrele kudala.

blocks.text: Ixesha elide abanye abantu babesitsho ngokungachanekanga ukuba i-Afrika yayingenabo ubukumkani obukhulu bayo. IMapungubwe ikungqina oku kuphosakele. Namhlanje **yiNdawo yeLifa leHlabathi (World Heritage Site)** ekhuselwe wonke umntu, kwaye owona wonga uphakamileyo woMzantsi Afrika, i**Order of Mapungubwe**, ubizwa ngayo.

items: Ibonisa ubuchule base-Afrika kwigolide, ekulimeni nakurhwebo.
Ikhuselwe ukuze abafundi bexesha elizayo bakwazi ukuyifunda nabo.
Inika abantu baseMzantsi Afrika imbali abazingca ngayo, abayabelanayo.

image.alt: Iribhoni yembasa yegolide enophawu olukhulwana lomkhombe, ecaleni kwekhaka lendawo ekhuselweyo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M70 40 l18 40 h-36 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='70' cy='96' r='26' fill='#e8a13a' stroke='#c8871f' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M58 100 q6 -12 24 -8 q-4 8 -24 8 Z' fill='#a8762f'/><g><rect x='140' y='48' width='70' height='80' rx='6' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M175 60 l24 12 v18 q0 20 -24 30 q-24 -10 -24 -30 v-18 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='175' cy='92' r='9' fill='#7a8b5a'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Phelisa umxholo ngombono wokuzingca nentlonipho. Gxininisa ngobunono umbono wokulwa ubuhlanga kwiBanga 6: iMapungubwe bubungqina bokuba abantu baseMzantsi Afrika bakha uluntu oluphuhlileyo kudala phambi kokuhlala kwabelungu. Nxibelelanisa nelifa abafundi abanokulazi - iiNdawo zeLifa leHlabathi, amawonga elizwe.

slides.heading: Esikufundileyo
slides.lead: IMapungubwe yayibubukumkani bokuqala baseMzantsi Afrika - obusisityebi ngenxa yokulima, iinkomo norhwebo lwegolide ne-ivory, kwaye bulawulwa ngukumkani ophezu kwenduli.

blocks.text: Khumbula imibono emikhulu: **phi** (iNtlambo yaseLimpopo), **nini** (malunga no-1220-1300), **ubutyebi** (urhwebo lwegolide ne-ivory), **umkhombe wegolide**, **ukumkani ophezu kwenduli** ngaphezu kwabantu abaqhelekileyo, kunye **nokuwa** xa imozulu yoma waza urhwebo lwafudukela eGreat Zimbabwe.

blocks.question: Khankanya izinto ezimbini iMapungubwe eyayizirhweba namazwe akude, nento enye eyayifumana ngokubuyisela.
Kutheni ukumkani nosapho lwasebukhosini babehlala phezu kwenduli? Kwabonisa ntoni oku ngabo?
Nika isizathu esinye ababhali-mbali abacinga ngaso ukuba iMapungubwe yehla emva malunga no-1300.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa le mibuzo mithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliweyo okanye ingxoxo yeklasi. Ukwabiwa kwamanqaku kulandela iindlela zeNqanaba eliPhakathi leCAPS. Khuthaza abafundi ukuba baphendule ngezivakalisi ezipheleleyo baze basebenzise isigama sesifundo: ubukumkani, urhwebo, i-ivory, ingcali yezinto zakudala, ubukhosi, ukuwa. Vala ngokunxibelelanisa nesihloko esilandelayo esinokwenzeka, iGreat Zimbabwe.
